old_value: {"id":"broadside-gjiz","title":"Serve HTML profile page for browser visitors (content negotiation)","description":"GET /users/{username} currently always returns application/activity+json. When Accept header prefers text/html (browser visit, 'view on original site' link in Mastodon), serve a simple HTML profile page showing display name, bio, recent posts, and metadata fields. Use content negotiation: Accept: application/activity+json → JSON-LD, Accept: text/html → HTML page.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T02:53:40.917678695Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T02:53:40.917678695Z","labels":["federation"]}

new_value: HTML profile page served via content negotiation. Browser gets styled HTML with display name, bio, metadata fields, recent posts. AP clients get JSON-LD. Same URL.
